payload.answer: There is a possible status transition conflict. Existing memory says the Brain Slack agent is planned and open, while the new information says the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented. If the MVP is the same tracked project or supersedes the planned/open state, choose approve_supersession. If the broader Brain Slack agent remains planned/open while only its MVP is implemented, choose keep_both. If the new statement is incorrect, choose reject_new. If either statement needs clarification, choose edit.
citations: Existing project state: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open.
New: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement may refer to the same project progressing from planned/open to implemented, or it may refer specifically to an MVP that is distinct from the broader Brain Slack agent project.
